title: Cybersecurity Expert
description: Master the art of defending networks and systems by deeply understanding how they can be broken.

courses.title: Computer Networking: A Top-Down Approach
courses.description: Kurose and Ross. Essential for understanding the network stacks you will defend and attack.

courses.title: Practical Malware Analysis
courses.description: The Hands-On Guide to Dissecting Malicious Software by Michael Sikorski and Andrew Honig.

courses.title: Security Engineering
courses.description: A Guide to Building Dependable Distributed Systems by Ross Anderson.

courses.title: The Web Application Hacker's Handbook
courses.description: Finding and Exploiting Security Flaws by Dafydd Stuttard & Marcus Pinto.

details.importance: They guard the world's infrastructure, financial systems, and private data against ever-evolving malicious adversaries.
details.rolesAndResponsibilities: Penetration testing, cryptography implementation, system auditing, and incident response.
details.aiImpact: AI will aid in anomaly detection and automate basic patching, but defending against complex, novel (zero-day) exploits requires human ingenuity.
details.marketDemand: Critically high. The cost of data breaches has forced companies to invest heavily in security.

expectations.junior: Monitor alerting systems, perform standard vulnerability scans, and write post-mortem reports.
expectations.mid: Conduct deep penetration tests, design secure SDLC pipelines, and manage bug bounty programs.
expectations.senior: Design enterprise-wide security architectures, handle crisis negotiations during massive breaches, and define cryptographic standards.
